complaints.description: The room next door had a very loud party until 02:00 AM on the second night. We called the front desk but it took over an hour for the noise to stop. It significantly affected our sleep.

timeline.label: Complaint Received
timeline.note: Your complaint has been logged and assigned to our Duty Manager.

timeline.label: Under Investigation
timeline.note: Duty Manager has spoken with guests in the adjacent room. The noise has been addressed.

timeline.label: Compensation Offered
timeline.note: We sincerely apologise for the disturbance. A complimentary breakfast and spa credit of LKR 5,000 has been applied to your folio.

timeline.label: Resolved
timeline.note: Guest confirmed satisfaction with the resolution. Marked as resolved.

complaints.description: Waited over 45 minutes for breakfast to be delivered despite ordering at 07:30. No updates were given during the wait.

timeline.label: Complaint Received
timeline.note: Your feedback has been logged and shared with our F&B Manager.

timeline.label: Being Reviewed
timeline.note: F&B Manager is reviewing kitchen logs for this morning. We will respond within 2 hours.
